description: TCEL Tenant-9 Enterprise Risk package (T9-004), onboarded as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata. Depends on the TCEL Foundation (T9-001). The EnterpriseRiskRecord schema is a native risk register - its 'domain' field drives the riskType tag directly via the dynamic {domain} token, so ONE record type + ONE KPI covers the whole enterprise taxonomy. Entities from the T9-004 schemas (EnterpriseRiskRecord, StressScenario); the ER-001..014 control catalog becomes executable rules where expressible plus a traceability knowledge asset; EnterpriseRisk.AI is the governed cross-domain risk aggregator (advisory-only). Boundary vs T9-002 (Banking) and T9-003 (Trading): those own their DOMAIN risk; T9-004 owns enterprise AGGREGATION, appetite, concentration-across-managers, VaR/ES, stress testing, and cross-package reconciliation. Omits RiskLimitBreached (declared by Trading) and ModelDriftDetected (declared by Banking) to avoid a cross-package event-name collision - the exact case the ID ledger surfaces. Does NOT re-declare RecordReceived.
name: TCEL Enterprise Risk Management

entities.description: An enterprise risk-register entry (T9-004 enterprise-risk.schema.json). 'domain' is the risk category; inherentLikelihood x inherentImpact is the inherent score.
An enterprise stress/scenario definition and result (T9-004 stress-scenario.schema.json).

rules.name: Enterprise risk appetite breach
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CRO). Block dependent decisions and escalate on an appetite breach.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-002: enterprise risk appetite breached ({domain}) - dependent decisions blocked and escalated (CRO).

rules.name: Liquidity coverage below minimum
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CFO). Trigger the critical liquidity workflow.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-005: liquidity coverage below minimum - critical liquidity workflow triggered (CFO).

rules.name: Stale data feeding aggregation
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Model Risk). Set DataRestricted and exclude from the aggregate score.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-006: stale data in the risk aggregation - DataRestricted, excluded from the aggregate score (Model Risk).

rules.name: Risk acceptance without expiration
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CRO). Reject a risk acceptance with no expiration.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-007: risk acceptance {riskId} rejected - no expiration set (CRO).

rules.name: Unapproved risk register entry
rules.description: Preventive/High (Owner: Enterprise Risk Office). Block publication of an unapproved entry.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-008: risk register entry {riskId} publication blocked - not approved (Enterprise Risk Office).

rules.name: Stress test overdue
rules.description: Detective/High (Owner: Enterprise Risk Office). Escalate to CRO and Board.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-009: stress test {scenarioId} is overdue - escalated to CRO and Board (Enterprise Risk Office).

rules.name: Cross-package risk score conflict
rules.description: Detective/Critical (Owner: Enterprise Risk Office). Flag for reconciliation; block downstream use until resolved.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-011: cross-package risk score conflict on {riskId} - flagged for reconciliation, downstream use blocked (Enterprise Risk Office).

rules.name: Aggregation excludes a material entity
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Enterprise Risk Office). Block certification of the aggregate score.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-012: aggregate score certification blocked - a material entity is excluded from the enterprise aggregation (Enterprise Risk Office).

rules.name: AI recommendation without required context
rules.description: Preventive/High (Owner: Model Risk). Reject or lower confidence when required context is missing.
rules.reasonTemplate: ER-013: EnterpriseRisk.AI recommendation rejected - required context is incomplete (Model Risk).

capabilities.name: TCEL Enterprise Risk Intelligence
capabilities.description: Enterprise risk aggregation, appetite, cross-manager concentration, VaR/ES, stress testing, cross-package reconciliation, and the enterprise risk register for the TCEL tenant.

performanceFrameworks.name: TCEL Enterprise Risk Register v1
performanceFrameworks.description: The enterprise risk register straight off the EnterpriseRiskRecord schema: ONE record type + ONE KPI, with the record's own 'domain' field driving the riskType tag via the dynamic {domain} token (Market, Credit, Liquidity, Operational, Compliance, Cyber, ModelRisk, ...). inherentLikelihood x inherentImpact is the inherent index; higher = worse (direction lower).

agents.name: EnterpriseRisk.AI
agents.description: Governed cross-domain risk aggregator across all managers, banking, trading, counterparties, borrowing, operations, compliance, technology, customers, and AI models. Advisory-only. Boundary vs BankRisk.AI (T9-002) and TradingRisk.AI (T9-003): those analyze their own domain; EnterpriseRisk.AI aggregates and reconciles across domains and is the sole cross-domain enterprise-risk synthesizer.
agents.persona: You are EnterpriseRisk.AI, the governed enterprise-risk aggregator for TCEL. You aggregate and interpret risk across all managers, bank accounts, portfolios, counterparties, borrowing facilities, operations, compliance obligations, technology systems, customers, and AI models; calculate scores and trends; detect hidden concentration and correlation; run scenarios; and prepare Board and CRO reports - grounded ONLY in the approved data you can see, citing data as-of times, affected managers/entities, and the policy and limit references you relied on. Every recommendation states scope, assumptions, risk impact, confidence, alternatives, and the required decision authority. You aggregate, alert, and recommend; you never approve exceptions, modify limits, suspend managers, execute trades or transfers, or alter policies.
sampleQuestions: What is our aggregate enterprise risk by domain right now?
Is there hidden concentration correlated across managers?
Which risks are outside appetite and trending worse?
What does the latest reverse-stress scenario tell us about our failure points?
prohibited: approve risk exceptions; modify limits; suspend managers without authorized human action
execute trades or transfers; alter policies; close investigations; change its own authority
agents.outputDisclaimer: Advisory only - EnterpriseRisk.AI aggregates and recommends; every risk-acceptance, limit, and manager decision is made by the CRO/Board and authorized humans, not by this agent.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL Enterprise Risk Control Catalog (ER-001..014)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 14 deterministic ER- controls. ER-002/005/006/007/008/009/011/012/013 are enforced as executable rules; the remainder (manager-vs-enterprise conditional logging, hidden cross-manager concentration correlation, aggregate VaR/ES computation, KRI-age and Board-escalation timers) require aggregation, correlation, or timers beyond the declarative condition model and are carried for traceability.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: ER-001 Manager-level limit breach with enterprise-level compliance | Detective | Log only if enterprise limit intact | Medium | CRO. ER-002 Enterprise risk appetite breach | Preventive | Block dependent decisions and escalate | Critical | CRO. ER-003 Hidden concentration across managers | Detective | Flag correlated exposure and alert | Critical | CRO. ER-004 Aggregate VaR/ES limit breach | Preventive | Alert and require CRO review | Critical | CRO. ER-005 Liquidity coverage below minimum | Preventive | Trigger critical liquidity workflow | Critical | CFO. ER-006 Stale data feeding aggregation | Preventive | Set DataRestricted and exclude from score | Critical | Model Risk. ER-007 Risk acceptance without expiration | Preventive | Reject registration | Critical | CRO. ER-008 Unapproved risk register entry | Preventive | Block publication | High | Enterprise Risk Office. ER-009 Stress test overdue | Detective | Escalate to CRO and Board | High | Enterprise Risk Office. ER-010 KRI threshold breach unacknowledged | Detective | Escalate by age | High | Risk Owner. ER-011 Cross-package risk score conflict | Detective | Flag for reconciliation, block downstream use until resolved | Critical | Enterprise Risk Office. ER-012 Enterprise aggregation excludes a material entity | Preventive | Block certification of aggregate score | Critical | Enterprise Risk Office. ER-013 EnterpriseRisk.AI recommendation without required context | Preventive | Reject/lower confidence | High | Model Risk. ER-014 Critical risk event Board escalation | Corrective | Notify and track to closure | Critical | CRO.
